enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder about getting his Mac working again, discusses his scattered train of thought, talks with his mom about doing a cross-country bike trip, mentions recording audiobooks with his restored computer, and rambles about his weight and bell curve theory while high on marijuana.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to do it but is hesitant due to physical discomfort (back, stomach, shoulders)
openly uses it; acknowledges being too high to do certain things
enjoys it and is excited to resume now that his Mac works
doesn't exercise at all but isn't very concerned about it
plans to turn it off every night to keep it working
